name: @rdf-shuttle/gen-js
description: Shuttle JS backend: emits a dependency-free streaming parser + serializer module from a .shuttle grammar

scripts.generate: npm run generate:turtle12 && npm run generate:shaclc
scripts.generate:shaclc: node src/cli.js ../../grammars/shaclc12ext.shuttle -o generated/shaclc12.js --profile rdf12 && node src/cli.js ../../grammars/shaclc12ext.shuttle -o generated/shaclc12ext.js --profile rdf12,ext
